profiles.name: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum
profiles.short_description: A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour.
profiles.tasting_summary: Enjoy notes of mild vanilla, toasted oak, clove and honey with a smooth finish. Vanilla and cinnamon Dark honey and clove Toffee and oak
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum is a gold rum aged for at least four years, with a soft golden color and a smooth, refined character. It opens with aromas of vanilla and cinnamon, followed by a palate of dark honey and clove. The finish brings toffee and oak, with mild vanilla, toasted oak, and a smooth finish overall. Best served in cocktails or highballs, it adds sophistication to mixed drinks and suits rum drinks that highlight honey, caramel, vanilla, oak, cinnamon, and spice.
profiles.display_description: A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour.

evidence_fields.name: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum
evidence_fields.short_description: A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour.
evidence_fields.tasting_summary: Enjoy notes of mild vanilla, toasted oak, clove and honey with a smooth finish. Vanilla and cinnamon Dark honey and clove Toffee and oak
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Use BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum to imbue your cocktails with a flair of sophistication.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Tropical
profiles.short_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Tropical is a flavoured rum with a bright Caribbean, summer-ready profile built around juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava. It reads as smooth and balanced, with a tropical fruit-forward aroma and palate that leans lush, juicy and lightly creamy. Best served mixed, it works well with soda water, lemonade, pineapple juice, cranberry juice or orange juice, and is especially suited to easy cocktails and long drinks. Flavor and use tags: pineapple, coconut, guava, citrus, cocktail mixer, tropical rum.
profiles.display_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.

evidence_fields.name: BACARDÍ Tropical
evidence_fields.short_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Mix with soda water, lemonade, pineapple juice, cranberry juice, or orange juice. Ideal for cocktails and other mixed drinks.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Carta Blanca
profiles.short_description: Savor the original premium white rum. With soft hints of almond and vanilla, BACARDÍ Superior blends seamlessly into the perfect cocktail.
profiles.tasting_summary: A classic profile. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum serves up orange blossom, lavender and rose, teamed with apricot, lime, light coconut and ripe banana. Almonds and fruit Smooth and creamy Dry, clean, fresh
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Carta Blanca is a classic white rum made for mixing, light and aromatic with a smooth, creamy palate and a dry, clean, fresh finish. It opens with almond and fruit on the nose, then shows delicate floral and fruity notes of orange blossom, lavender, rose, apricot, lime, light coconut, ripe banana, soft vanilla and a touch of oak. Filtered for distinctive smoothness and aged in American white oak barrels, it blends seamlessly without overpowering other ingredients. Ideal for classic cocktails like the Mojito and Daiquiri, plus rum punch, rum and cola, Piña Colada, and other bright, refreshing cocktail builds.
profiles.display_description: Savor the original premium white rum. With soft hints of almond and vanilla, BACARDÍ Superior blends seamlessly into the perfect cocktail.

evidence_fields.name: BACARDÍ Carta Blanca
evidence_fields.short_description: Savor the original premium white rum. With soft hints of almond and vanilla, BACARDÍ Superior blends seamlessly into the perfect cocktail.
evidence_fields.tasting_summary: A classic profile. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum serves up orange blossom, lavender and rose, teamed with apricot, lime, light coconut and ripe banana. Almonds and fruit Smooth and creamy Dry, clean, fresh
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Perfect for classic rum cocktails like the Mojito. The Perfect Mixer. Ideal for mixing.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Carta Negra
profiles.short_description: BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum is a medium-bodied black rum, crafted with passion by the Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ.
profiles.tasting_summary: A journey that begins with sweet, tropical fruit, buttery caramel and vanilla notes and ends with a smoky liquorice and molasses finish. Toasted and nutty Tropical and medium-bodied Smoky and molasses
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Carta Negra is a medium-bodied dark rum with rich black-rum character, expertly blended and matured in heavily charred oak barrels. It opens with toasted, nutty aromas and a tropical, fruity palate layered with buttery caramel and vanilla. The finish turns smoky, with liquorice and molasses notes. Smooth and full-flavored, it can be enjoyed neat or used to add depth and spice in cocktails. Well suited to rum punch, Hurricane, Jungle Bird, Zombie, and Tormenta Negra, with useful tags for vanilla, oak, caramel, fruity, smoky, molasses, and neat sipping.
profiles.display_description: BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum is a medium-bodied black rum, crafted with passion by the Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ.

evidence_fields.name: BACARDÍ Carta Negra

evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Spice it up or keep it neat, any combination will be one to savour.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Carta Oro
profiles.short_description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.
profiles.tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum brings together rich, soothing flavours like vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond and sweet banana notes balanced by the warm zest of orange peel and a light, oaky finish. Nuts and butter Rich and toasted Dry and slightly sweet
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Carta Oro is a gold rum with a mellow, toasted character and golden color, aged in toasted oak barrels and charcoal filtered. It opens with a nutty, buttery aroma, then shows a rich, toasted palate of vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond, sweet banana, and zesty orange peel. The finish is light, oaky, dry, and slightly sweet, with a smooth, soothing texture. Best served in bold, punchy cocktails, especially a Cuba Libre or rum toddy. Useful search tags: gold rum, vanilla, caramel, banana, citrus, oak, mellow, smooth, cocktail rum.
profiles.display_description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.

evidence_fields.name: BACARDÍ Carta Oro
evidence_fields.short_description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.
evidence_fields.tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum brings together rich, soothing flavours like vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond and sweet banana notes balanced by the warm zest of orange peel and a light, oaky finish. Nuts and butter Rich and toasted Dry and slightly sweet
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Best for bursts of flavour. BACARDÍ Carta Oro craves zesty, punchy, and bold cocktails to acquaint with.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Coconut
profiles.short_description: BACARDÍ Coconut brings the beach to your backyard.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Coconut is a flavoured rum made from a blend of white rum and real coconut essence, designed to bring a tropical, beachy character to the glass. It has clean, mellow flavors with a smooth, easygoing feel and a distinctly coconut-forward profile, lifted by citrus and pineapple notes. Ideal for refreshing serves, it works well over ice or mixed into simple, sunny drinks. Especially suited to fruit-forward cocktails like a Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice, Rum Rita, Lime Cooler, Raspberry Mojito, or Limonade, it’s a versatile choice for coconut, tropical, citrus, and summer cocktail use.

profiles.name: Coquito
profiles.short_description: A cream-based coconut liqueur, Coquito is a traditional Puerto Rican holiday cocktail.
profiles.tasting_summary: A silky coconut flavor, toasty spices and hints of vanilla and cinnamon that celebrate the Caribbean culture and holidays.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Coquito is a cream-based coconut liqueur and traditional Puerto Rican holiday cocktail made with BACARDÍ Superior Rum. It delivers a silky, smooth coconut profile with toasty festive spices, vanilla, and cinnamon, evoking Caribbean holiday flavors. Rich and creamy in texture, it works well served chilled or as a ready-to-enjoy dessert-style drink, and it can also add coconut, spice, and vanilla depth to holiday cocktails. Flavor tags: coconut, vanilla, cinnamon, spiced, creamy, Caribbean, festive, cocktail.
profiles.display_description: A cream-based coconut liqueur, Coquito is a traditional Puerto Rican holiday cocktail.

profiles.name: DRAGONBERRY
profiles.short_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Dragonberry is a flavoured rum built around exotic dragon fruit and juicy strawberry sweetness. Bright, fruity and bold, it offers a playful tropical-style profile with a sweet, easygoing character. It’s designed for mixing rather than sipping neat, with a smooth, crowd-pleasing taste that works well in simple highballs and fruit-forward cocktails. Serve it with ginger ale for a Dragonberry and ginger ale cocktail, or mix it with cola or lemonade for an easy, refreshing serve. Use as a fruity cocktail base, mixer-friendly rum, and sweet tropical flavor tag.
profiles.display_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.

evidence_fields.name: DRAGONBERRY
evidence_fields.short_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Try our Dragonberry and ginger ale cocktail. You can also mix flavoured rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Lime
profiles.short_description: If an impromptu beach party had a flavour – BACARDÍ Lime would be it.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Lime is a flavoured rum from BACARDÍ, crafted for bright, easygoing citrus character. It suggests an impromptu beach-party vibe, with zesty lime at the core and supporting tropical notes of pineapple and coconut. Designed for simple mixing, it works well splashed into a favorite beverage or built as a BACARDÍ Lime and soda for a refreshing, low-effort serve. Its flavor profile suits light, fruity cocktails and sunny, casual drinks, making it a strong choice for lime-forward serves, citrus mixers, and tropical cocktail use.

profiles.name: LIMÓN
profiles.short_description: BACARDÍ Limón flavored rum glistens like sunshine in your glass.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ LIMÓN is a flavored rum with a bright citrus profile, named after the Spanish word for lemon. It blends the fresh taste of lemon, lime, and grapefruit for a sunny, zesty character. The aroma and palate lean clean, juicy, and fruit-forward, with a crisp citrus finish and an easy, refreshing smoothness. Best served mixed, especially with lemonade in the signature BACARDÍ Limónade, and well suited to light, tropical, and citrus-driven cocktails like mojitos, rum ritas, and cooler-style drinks. Flavor tags: citrus, lemon, lime, grapefruit, fruity, refreshing, bright.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum
profiles.short_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum is a flavoured white rum with a crisp, sweet-tart raspberry profile. It combines the clean character of white rum with bright berry flavour for a tangy, mouth-watering taste. Light and refreshing in style, it suits easy mixed drinks and soda serves, especially when you want a fruity rum with a lively, zesty edge. Best used in simple highballs, citrus-forward cocktails, or rum-based twists on classic refreshers. Flavor tags: raspberry, sweet-tart, citrus, fruity, crisp, refreshing, mixer-friendly.
profiles.display_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.

evidence_fields.short_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez
profiles.short_description: Barrel-aged for a minimum of 10 years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez balances fruity flavors with classic vanilla.
profiles.tasting_summary: Discover bright notes of stone fruits, banana and pear balanced with caramelized vanilla and oak. Almond and peach Banana, pear and vanilla Pineapple and cinnamon
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez is an aged rum and premium sipping rum, expertly blended and barrel-aged for a minimum of 10 years under the Caribbean sun, then charcoal filtered for a smooth finish. It offers a fruity, balanced profile with notes of almond and peach on the nose, banana, pear, and vanilla on the palate, and a finish of pineapple and cinnamon. Expect bright stone-fruit character alongside caramelized vanilla and oak, with a smooth, refined texture. Best enjoyed neat or as a contemplative sipper, with strong appeal for vanilla, oak, caramel, banana, pineapple, and spice-driven rum searches.
profiles.display_description: Barrel-aged for a minimum of 10 years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez balances fruity flavors with classic vanilla.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada
profiles.short_description: A smooth and delightful rum from the BACARDÍ Premium range, Gran Reserva Limitada is perfect to sip and savor. Each golden glass delivers a medley of warm flavors.
profiles.tasting_summary: Rich and complex. Smooth notes of butterscotch and dried fruit melt away to a long, dry finish. Almond and vanilla Dried raisins and chocolate Soft oak and raisin
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada is a premium aged rum blended from scarce, including some of the brand’s oldest, rum stocks. Rich and complex, it shows almond and vanilla on the nose, then dried raisins and chocolate on the palate, with smooth butterscotch and dried fruit character. The finish is long, dry, soft oak, and raisin-forward. Golden, smooth, and refined, it is best sipped and savored neat. Flavor tags: vanilla, oak, dried fruit, chocolate, raisin, butterscotch, dark fruit, and smooth aged rum.
profiles.display_description: A smooth and delightful rum from the BACARDÍ Premium range, Gran Reserva Limitada is perfect to sip and savor. Each golden glass delivers a medley of warm flavors.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum
profiles.short_description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.
profiles.tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is a complex golden rum with a deep, layered and mellow flavor of dried fruits, spices and oaky vanilla. Dried apricot and banana leaf Oak and spices Expansive and well-rounded
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum is a dark, golden sipping rum and the Family Reserve, aged a minimum of eight years. It has a deep, layered, mellow profile with dried fruits, stone fruit, spices, oak, and oaky vanilla. The nose suggests dried apricot and banana leaf, while the palate brings oak and spice. The finish is expansive and well-rounded, with a smooth, rounded texture. Best enjoyed neat or on the rocks, and well suited to classic rum cocktails like an Old Fashioned, Old Cuban, Hotel Nacional, or Rum Negroni. Flavor tags: vanilla, oak, fruity, banana, dried fruit, spice.
profiles.display_description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.

profiles.name: BACARDÍ Spiced
profiles.short_description: A rum with charisma that adds both light and deep notes to your drink.
profiles.tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Spiced has upfront notes of creamy delicious vanilla, woody and subtle honey through the mid-palette, and a natural cinnamon and nutmeg spice finish. Vanilla and cinnamon Sweet and spiced Black pepper and fudge
profiles.searchable_text: BACARDÍ Spiced is a spiced rum made with aged rum and blended natural flavours and spices, with a gentle smoky note from charred American oak barrels. It shows creamy vanilla and cinnamon on the nose, a sweet, spiced palate with woody oak and subtle honey, and a finish of natural cinnamon, nutmeg, black pepper and fudge. Bold yet smooth in texture, it suits ice-cold serves with cola or ginger beer and works well in mixed spiced rum drinks and cocktails such as rum punch, spiced mule, and pineapple-based drinks. Flavor tags: vanilla, oak, honey, pepper, cinnamon, pineapple.
profiles.display_description: A rum with charisma that adds both light and deep notes to your drink.
